body_excerpt: In gasket_free_coherent_memory_all of gasket_page_table.c, there is a possible memory corruption due to a double free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: In gasket_free_coherent_memory_all of gasket_page_table.c, there is a possible memory corruption due to a double free. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with System execution privileges
